name: Pine Meadow Golf Course
address: 4324 Fairfax Park Dr, Eau Claire, WI 54701
about: Pine Meadow Golf Club is a public facility featuring a Par-3, 9-hole golf course and indoor HD Golf simulators. The venue offers year-round golfing opportunities, allowing play in any weather with its two indoor simulator bays equipped with top PGA courses. Players can enjoy a quick pace of play on the course in under two hours on foot or rent a golf cart for a more leisurely round. The club provides club rentals for both left and right-handed players and features a full-service restaurant with catering options for groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf with HD Golf simulators
Quick play on the 9-hole Par-3 course
Club rentals available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu available, featuring a fish fry and pizzas. Catering for groups up to 75 people.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two HD Golf simulator bays available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available for all sizes and both left and right-handed players.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own kitchen and food menu available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On the 9-hole Par-3 course, you can enjoy a quick pace of play in under 2 hours on foot.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the course and facilities are perfect for golfers of all ages and skill levels, making it a family-friendly destination.
